name: Swedish Spritz (Spritsar) Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour and sugar onto a bread board.
2. Make a well in the center of the mixture and add egg yolks, butter, and almond extract.
3. Mix the ingredients into a smooth dough using your fingers.
4. Use a cookie press to form O and S shapes on ungreased cookie sheets.
5. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 8 to 10 minutes.
Yield: 8 dozen spritz cookies.
(Note: Store cookies in an air-tight container. You may want to let them sit for a day to "ripen" the almond flavor!)
